offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation processes lead to cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
